description: Controls exit order type, leg exit ordering, and post-completion actions.

fields.label: Exit Order Type
fields.description: Order type for exits. Only MARKET is active in backtester; Limit and SL_Limit are reserved for future live trading.

fields.label: Exit Sell Legs First
fields.description: When checked, SELL legs are closed before BUY legs during batch squareoff events.

fields.label: On Portfolio Complete (Not Applicable on Manual SqOff)
fields.description: Action to take when all legs in the portfolio have completed. Not triggered on manual squareoff.
